balance.no_wallet: [BALANCE] Kuskure: Ba a saita walat ba.

history.fetching: [HISTORY] Ana kwashe tarihin hada-hadar kudinku domin {{phone}}...
history.more: Amsa HISTORY MORE domin ganin tsofaffin hada-hadar kudi
history.no_more: Babu sauran hada-hadar kudi da za a nuna.
history.not_funded: Babu tarihin hada-hadar kudi — ba a saka kudi a walat dinku ba tukuna
history.unavailable: Tarihin hada-hadar kudi ba ya samuwa a halin yanzu. Don Allah a sake gwadawa anjima.
history.no_wallet: Kuskure: Ba a saita walat din ku ba.

send.no_wallet: Kuskure: Ba a saita walat din ku ba.
send.no_recipient: Kuskure: Ba a iya samun walat din mai amfani {{target}}.
send.success: ✅ An yi nasarar tura {{amount}} XLM zuwa {{target}}!

request.no_user: Kuskure: Ba a iya samun mai amfani {{target}}.
request.notify_recipient: 🔔 [REQUEST] {{sender}} yana neman {{amount}} XLM daga gare ku. Amsa da: SEND {{amount}} {{senderPhone}}

create_group.failed: ❌ Ba a yi nasarar kirkiro rukuni ba: {{message}}

join_group.failed: ❌ Ba a yi nasarar shiga rukuni ba: {{message}}

invite_member.no_user: Kuskure: Ba a iya samun mai amfani {{target}}.
invite_member.not_creator: Kuskure: Ba kai ne ka kirkiro kowane rukuni ba.
invite_member.notify_recipient:
🔔 [INVITE] {{sender}} ya gayyace ka ka shiga rukunin su na ajiya "{{groupName}}".

Amsa da: JOIN GROUP {{groupId}}

contribute.no_group: Kuskure: Ba ka cikin kowane rukuni.
contribute.amount_mismatch: ❌ Dole gudummawa ta zama daidai {{required}} XLM yadda rukunin nan ke bukata.
contribute.initiating: [CONTRIBUTE] Ana farawa bada gudummawa ta {{amount}} XLM ga "{{groupName}}"...
contribute.success: ✅ An yi nasarar bada gudummawar {{amount}} XLM ga "{{groupName}}"!
contribute.failed: ❌ Bada gudummawa bai yi nasara ba: {{message}}

validation.invalid_format: ❌ Tsarin adadi ba daidai bane. Don Allah sa lambar da ta wuce sifili (misali, 10 ko 10.50).
validation.precision_exceeded: ❌ Ba za a iya samun adadi fiye da maki na 7 bayan ɗigo ba.
validation.exceeds_max: ❌ Adadin ya wuce yawan da aka yarda da shi (1,000,000 XLM).

withdraw.no_group: Kuskure: Ba ka cikin kowane rukuni.
withdraw.success: ✅ An yi nasarar cire {{amount}} XLM daga asusun "{{groupName}}"! (MOCKED)

help.text:
*Umarnin Kolo:*

_Asusu_
BALANCE
BALANCE <kadari>
HISTORY
PROFILE

_Biyan Kudi_
SEND <adadi> <@mai_amfani>
REQUEST <adadi> <@mai_amfani>

_Rukunin Ajiya_
CREATE GROUP <suna> <adadi> <lokaci>
JOIN GROUP <groupId>
INVITE MEMBER <@mai_amfani>
GROUP STATUS
CONTRIBUTE <adadi>
WITHDRAW <adadi>

_Taimako_
HELP
SUPPORT

unknown.command: Ban gane wannan umarnin ba. Tura HELP domin ganin umarnin da ake da su.

language.current: Harshenka na yanzu shine: {{current}}. Amsa da LANGUAGE <yoruba/pidgin/french/hausa/igbo/english> domin canza shi.
language.unsupported: Ba a goyan bayan wannan harshen. Don Allah zabi daga: yoruba, pidgin, french, hausa, igbo, english.

wallet.usdc_trustline_low_reserve: Kuna buƙatar aƙalla XLM 2 a cikin walat ɗinku don kunna USDC.
